message:
feat(print): Support printing C extension objects

- Add .pyobject type detection in print codegen
- Generate simple pointer output for C extension PyObjects
- Add getTypeName helper to c_interop (for future use)
- Enhance printPyObjectImpl to call tp_str/tp_repr for unknown types

C extension objects (like numpy arrays) now print as:
  <C extension object at {address}>

Full string conversion requires unified PyObject type system
between runtime and c_interop (future enhancement).
